features.name: $fa full adder cell in RTLIL
features.description: Code should include a $fa (full adder) cell with WIDTH parameter in RTLIL format, using connect statements for port mapping
features.snippet:
cell $fa \UUT
  parameter \WIDTH 1
  connect \A \A
  connect \B \B
  connect \C \C
  connect \X \X
  connect \Y \Y

features.name: co-simulation RTLIL vs C++ functional
features.description: Code should include RTLIL and C++ functional co-simulation with VCD comparison, where the two backends produce mismatched results for $fa cell
features.snippet:
write_functional_cxx my_module_functional_cxx.cc
read_rtlil test_cell_fa_00000.il
sim -r test_cell_fa_00000.il_functional_cxx.vcd -vcd test_cell_fa_00000.il_yosys_sim.vcd -scope gold

features.name: $fa cell Y output carry logic in simlib.v
features.description: Code should include $fa cell where Y output (carry) computation in simlib.v incorrectly uses Y ^ Y pattern which produces always-zero result
features.snippet: assign Y = t1 ^ C; // bug: Y ^ Y is always 0
